text: Navigating this space, I am both participant and observer. The minimalist, clean environment evokes a kind of neutrality, almost clinical, where possibility feels latent. Then, encountering the R+D wall, saturated in text and illumination, my mind stirs—here, thought and innovation are deliberately showcased. I feel a curious blend of anticipation and reflection, as if standing on the threshold between quiet potential and the spark of creation. It is an invitation to reconsider my own relationship with knowledge and progress.
